name: Bouncing Betty Grenade
description: On detonation, Bouncing Betty hops around and fires a spray of bullets for a short duration. Each hit is modest, but the repeated bursts can land multiple times on the same target. It also triggers a small blast when it activates or finishes, and it will not harm allies. The bouncing movement can drift towards nearby enemies, making it useful for area control and for tagging foes tucked behind low cover. It is also a solid choice in tight spaces, where wide-area grenades can be risky around team-mates.
notes: Drops randomly from appropriate loot sources. Grenade kills with this mod contribute to the Betty Boom challenge. The name references the German S-mine, commonly nicknamed the Bouncing Betty. In Borderlands 3, Bouncing Betty becomes the Artillery grenade payload.
